summary: Planned one conservative classification for each PR in the mixed inventory shard. Security-sensitive PRs are routed to central security handling. Already-closed PRs are kept closed with skipped closeout. Open non-security PRs are kept open as independent or related review work; no close, merge, fix, label, or comment mutations are planned in plan mode.

actions.reason: This PR changes an agent-to-agent/session visibility authorization boundary and is explicitly marked security-sensitive in the hydrated artifact, so only scoped security routing is appropriate.

Encrypted backup/restore changes plus explicit security findings make this security-sensitive; route only this PR while continuing unrelated classifications.
